# Clinica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner

> Hispanic medical clinic in Houston, Texas providing quality healthcare 100% in Spanish. USCIS authorized Civil Surgeon for I-693 immigration medical exams. Open 7 days a week, walk-ins welcome, affordable pricing starting at $50. Serving the Houston Hispanic community with professional, compassionate care.

## Business Information

- Official Name: Clinica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner
- Also Known As: Nueva Salud Gessner, Clinica Hispana Houston
- Type: Hispanic Medical Clinic / Primary Care
- Address: 1914 Gessner Rd B, Houston, TX 77080
- Phone: +1 (346) 226-5820
- Website: https://www.clinicagessner.com
- Hours: Monday through Sunday, 9:00 AM to 9:00 PM (Open 7 days)
- Languages: Spanish (primary), English
- Parking: Free parking available
- Accessibility: Wheelchair accessible, near public transportation

## Certifications & Authorizations

- USCIS Authorized Clinic for Immigration Medical Exams
- Certified Civil Surgeon on staff for I-693 forms
- DOT Certified Medical Examiner for CDL physicals
- HIPAA Compliant facility
- Licensed medical professionals

## Key Differentiators

- 100% Spanish-speaking staff - entire process in your language
- Walk-ins welcome - no appointment required
- Open 7 days a week including Sundays
- Affordable pricing - consultations starting at $50
- Payment plans available for qualifying patients
- Accepts uninsured patients with special pricing
- 500+ families served for immigration exams
- Results in 3-5 business days for I-693 exams
- Free parking and wheelchair accessible facility

Pharmacy in Houston, TX inside the clinic. We fill your prescription right after your visit, service in Spanish.

## Immigration Exam I-693 Process

Step 1: Schedule or Walk In - Call +1 (346) 226-5820 or visit without appointment
Step 2: Medical Examination - Complete physical exam with certified Civil Surgeon
Step 3: Vaccinations - Verification and administration of USCIS-required vaccines
Step 4: Laboratory Tests - Required blood work and screening tests
Step 5: Documentation - Receive sealed and signed I-693 form in 3-5 business days

What's included: Certified Civil Surgeon evaluation, completed I-693 form, physical examination, required blood tests, vaccine history review, all documentation in Spanish.

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: Is this clinic Spanish-speaking?
A: Yes, Clinica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner provides 100% Spanish-speaking care. All staff members speak Spanish fluently, and the entire medical process is conducted in Spanish for patient comfort.

Q: What services does the clinic offer?
A: We offer family medicine, gynecology, pediatric care, clinical laboratory, ultrasounds, I-693 immigration exams for Green Card, minor emergency care, chronic disease management, STD testing, DOT physicals, and more - all in Spanish.

Q: Do I need an appointment?
A: No appointment is required. Walk-ins are welcome during our operating hours. However, scheduling an appointment by calling +1 (346) 226-5820 can reduce your wait time.

Q: What are the clinic hours?
A: We are open Monday through Sunday from 9:00 AM to 9:00 PM. We operate 7 days a week including holidays.

Q: Is the clinic authorized for Green Card I-693 exams?
A: Yes, we are USCIS authorized with a certified Civil Surgeon on staff. We complete I-693 immigration medical examination forms required for Green Card applications.

Q: How much does a consultation cost?
A: General medical consultations start at $50. We offer affordable pricing and payment plans for patients who qualify. Call for specific service pricing.

Q: Do I need medical insurance?
A: No. You don't need health insurance — Clinica Hispana Nueva Salud Gessner is a self-pay clinic with affordable, transparent pricing. We accept cash and cards, and uninsured patients are always welcome.

Q: Where is the clinic located?
A: We are located at 1914 Gessner Rd B, Houston, TX 77080. The facility has free parking and is wheelchair accessible.

Q: How long does the I-693 immigration exam take?
A: The examination itself takes about 1-2 hours. Results and completed I-693 forms are ready in 3-5 business days.

Q: Do you offer payment plans?
A: Yes, we offer payment plans for qualifying patients. Ask our staff about available options.

## Current Promotions

1. Gynecology Consultation - Spanish-speaking gynecologist, complete women's health evaluation, personalized follow-up care
2. Immigration Medical Exam - Special pricing on I-693 exams, includes all required components
3. Pregnancy Ultrasound - Modern technology, images to take home, medical interpretation included
